_notes.model: LLM for extraction: grok-3-mini-fast (default). Set via ENGRAM_MODEL env or here.
_notes.xai_api_key: Set here, via XAI_API_KEY env, or auto-detected from openclaw.json skills.entries.grok.apiKey
_notes.main_agent_id: Your primary agent ID. Files in memory_dir default to this agent.
_notes.memory_dir: Main agent memory directory. All files here are tagged with main_agent_id.
_notes.agent_workspaces: Map of agent_id → memory directory path for additional agents.
_notes.context_engine: Paths for the OpenClaw context engine plugin. Leave empty to auto-detect from workspace.
